name: RABBIT-FEATURE-SCOPE-BUG-18
title: feature.json surface.skills is empty but skill directory exists
description: feature.json declares surface.skills: [] (empty), but skills/rabbit-feature-scope/SKILL.md exists and is documented in spec.md as part of the surface. The skill is also deployed to .claude/skills/rabbit-feature-scope/SKILL.md. feature.json must list the skill in surface.skills (e.g., 'skills/rabbit-feature-scope/SKILL.md') for accurate surface declaration. This contradicts the Lifecycle and Ownership rule that artifacts declare their surface.

history.note: Wave 4 fix; verified by test/test-bug-fixes-wave4.py and test-resolve-scope.py
